prompt_appendix: Prioritize final image realism. The original stage1 reference is object-only on pure white background and exists only to preserve mug identity, silhouette, dark earthy brown ceramic color, and realistic glazed material response. The pseudo-reference is a rough target for how this mug should naturally integrate into the roadside autumn scene; do not over-penalize small differences in exact pose, shadow shape, or local composition. Use freeform review and only say keep when the mug genuinely looks naturally inserted.
